title: Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib
tagline: Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib — heritage city of Uttarakhand

overview.short: Nanakmatta is a town named after the Sikh pilgrimage site, Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib, also known as Gurdwara Nanakmatta Sahib, in the state of Uttarakhand, India.
overview.description: Nanakmatta is a town named after the Sikh pilgrimage site, Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib, also known as Gurdwara Nanakmatta Sahib, in the state of Uttarakhand, India. Sikh tradition says it was once called Gorakhmata, a centre of Siddh-jogis named after the founder of their order, Gorakhnath, and that it was renamed Nanakmatta after a visit which the Siddh-Gost in Guru Granth Sahib said Guru Nanak, the founder of Sikhism, made in which he discussed religion. It is on the bank of Deoha stream, which is dammed into a reservoir named Nanak Sagar. It is also an Uttarakhand Legislative Assembly constit

topPlaces.name: Nandhaur Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Nandhaur Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Uttarakhand, India that was created in 2012. It is located in the Terai Arc Landscape, a forest zone that stretches from Uttarakhand in India and extends into Nepal.

items.note: Nandhaur Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in Uttarakhand, India that was created in 2012. It is located in the Terai Arc Landscape, a forest zone that stretches from Uttarakhand in India and extends into Nepal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pantnagar Airport (34 km) and the nearest railway station is Haldwani Railway Station (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Nanak Mata Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nandhaur Wildlife Sanctuary.
